instruction: Someone repainted the yellow price tag on the bell off icon slightly-darker black. Set it back to the original.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/bell-off.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/><path d="M18.63 13A17.89 17.89 0 0 1 18 8"/><path d="M6.26 6.26A5.86 5.86 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h14"/><path d="M18 8a6 6 0 0 0-9.33-5"/><line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/></g>
  <rect id="price-tag" fill="#212121" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="84" y="96" width="28" height="14" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/bell-off.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/><path d="M18.63 13A17.89 17.89 0 0 1 18 8"/><path d="M6.26 6.26A5.86 5.86 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h14"/><path d="M18 8a6 6 0 0 0-9.33-5"/><line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/></g>
  <rect id="price-tag" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="84" y="96" width="28" height="14" />
</svg>
